{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323135152876158E58C311BBA31F7"}"},"total":646},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7511345715698074392","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"无cp，系统+穿越+日常+能听宠物心声，4.5分，男主和宠物的相处日常挺温馨的，没什么大问题和误会，无聊可以看看放松一下的，就是结局有点突然没了，就有点突兀了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1748875902,"group_id":"7461993382617812030","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"争取看完喜欢的所有书^O^","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2xn3Va5KFDAG9taLIxgQDLqyI9TYX5/TIETs6RBic5C","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/257b7fae915a40c491257657cea88c89~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791481&x-signature=Xda43%2FljDDHPzosJFKKzvp%2F7%2BBo%3D","user_id":"3619213454097652","user_name":"憨猪包-.-"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3619213454097652","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7461993382617812030","book_info":{"abstract":"沈青穿越当天继承了父母唯一的遗产---宠物店。
系统觉醒，收集直播间的情绪值，可获得奖励。
并且还开通了偷听动物心声技能。
只不过眼前的宠物店好像不对劲啊。
没有可爱的小猫咪，小狗狗，只有捕鸟蛛、黑寡妇、熊猫蚂蚁、毒剑蛙、杀人蝎、石头鱼....
捕鸟蛛：【人类，吃饭的时间到了，你怎么还站在那里不动？】
黑寡妇蜘蛛：【人类，没经过我的允许，你居然敢碰我，小心我咬你！】
熊猫蚂蚁：【人类，你是不是也觉得我今天很可爱？】
石头鱼：【谁能给予人类最疼的刺痛，当然是我，怎么，你也想试试....】
本来想开个宠物店，结果里面全是有毒的动物。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o7b7a5d18b307d88f7e79a2d4d94aae3d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"云安同学","author_id":"","book_id":"7461993382617812030","book_name":"让开宠物店，你店里五毒俱全？","book_short_name":"毒宠宠物店","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281038","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5007人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7461993443305210430","read_count":"5007","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"480617"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"216","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,直播,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o7b7a5d18b307d88f7e79a2d4d94aae3d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779429112&x-signature=LLZ5WdHmWl7xyK59EKDqJYRPJ74%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2192844506278472","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"227"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323135152876158E58C311BBA31F7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"for
